name: com.bizsim.google.play.games
displayName: BizSim Google Play Games Services Bridge
description: Unity bridge for Google Play Games Services v2. Modular async API for Authentication, Achievements, Leaderboards, Saved Games (Cloud Save), Events, and Player Stats. ISocialPlatform-independent. First release under the new com.bizsim.google.play.* package family.

samples.description: Authentication, achievements, and leaderboard submission in a single scene.
Pre-configured mock configs for common scenarios (authenticated, guest, error).
